scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,stream,bot -c cyan,yellow,magenta 'bun run --cwd core dev' 'bun run --cwd stream dev' 'bun run --cwd bot dev'
scripts.build: bun run --cwd shared build && bun run --cwd core build && bun run --cwd persona build && bun run --cwd stream build && bun run --cwd bot build
